links.evidence: |year=2024 |title=Estrilda rhodopyga |volume=2024 |article-number=e.T22719562A263828821 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2024-2.RLTS.T22719562A263828821.en |access-date=19 June 2025}} | taxon = Estrilda rhodopyga | authority = Sundevall, 1850 }} The crimson-rumped waxbill (Estrilda rhodopyga) also known as rosy-rumped waxbill is a common species of estrildid finch found in eastern Africa
